title.rendered: Announcing our 2025 Certificate Programs for Nonprofit Professionals! 🎉

content.rendered: In 2025, Nonprofit Tech for Good will offer three low-cost certificate programs for nonprofit professionals. The curriculum covers website and email marketing, online fundraising, social media, and artificial intelligence (AI). To earn the certificates, you can attend the webinars live or view the recordings—or a combination of both.
